title: lichtensteinia inebrians
intro: Lichtensteinia inebrians, also known as the intoxicating plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Lichtensteinia inebrians include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
